meaning: n.娓呮壂鎴垮眿,闈╅櫎,鑲冩竻
examples: I feel we ought to have a housecleaning.
Perhaps this time the housecleaning can be thorough.
She helps him with the housecleaning and bill paying.
Stanford School of Medicine is piloting a project to provide doctors with housecleaning and in-home dinner delivery.
"He recognized the need for serious housecleaning, " said Cardinal Herranz, who voted in the conclave that elected Pope Benedict.
